name: Double Chocolate Hits
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
Heat oven to 350°F. In a large bowl, beat butter, sugar, egg and vanilla until well blended. In a small bowl, stir cocoa and buttermilk until smooth. Add to butter mixture; beat well. Stir together flour, baking soda and salt; add to butter mixture, beating just until blended. Stir in mini chocolate chips. Drop dough by teaspoons onto ungreased cookie sheet. Bake 8 to 10 minutes or until center of cookies is not quite set. Remove from cookie sheet to wire rack. Cool completely. About 3-1/2 dozen cookies.
To make sour milk: Use 1-1/2 teaspoons white vinegar plus milk to equal 1/2 cup.
